commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d0378fd6855c53b0b8ff58154a4a33ea07931fb6)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `.catch()` logging and delayed recovery around subagent lifecycle `completeSubagentRun` fire-and-forget paths, widens orphan reconciliation source typing, and adds a registry regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main has unhandled fire-and-forget lifecycle completion calls and `completeSubagentRun` persists terminal state before later cleanup work. I did not establish a live forced-rejection reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has P1 recovery/rebase blockers and insufficient real behavior proof, which automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(agents): add .catch() to fire-and-forget subagent lifecycle promises
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
